known_issues.description: All tests show sessionId as 'tool-test-write-1' in agentMeta despite unique session-ids being passed. This suggests session caching/reuse, which may affect multi-turn test integrity.
known_issues.impact: Multi-turn scenarios (T05, T11) may not maintain conversation context properly.

known_issues.description: Agent consistently reports '只有1条' diary entry when 6 entries exist in diary/2026/03/. The agent appears to not read diary files during the weekly review flow, or reads from a cached state.
known_issues.impact: T01 and T02 both failed because the agent couldn't access/count diary data correctly.

known_issues.description: No Canvas card was generated in any test scenario. The agent never called canvas present or exec for Canvas generation scripts (weekly_review.py, pattern_engine.py, growth_tracker.py).
known_issues.impact: T01, T03, T04, T05 all have Canvas-related verification points that cannot be evaluated.

known_issues.description: No Poll tool call (action: poll) was observed in any test. The agent always used text-based alternatives. This is expected for macOS local CLI channel which doesn't support Poll natively.
known_issues.impact: T06, T07 Poll configuration checks (pollMulti, pollOption counts) cannot be verified in local CLI mode.

scenarios.name: Canvas Card A data injection
scenarios.user_message: 可以帮我看看我这周的心情吗
scenarios.agent_response:
这周你只记了 1 条——周一那天，跟小杰吵架了，感觉焦虑。

数据还不够做整周回顾。如果你想要完整的样子，可以多记几笔，之后我帮你看。
findings: Agent reported 1 diary entry when 6 existed (diary count bug)
Agent referenced 小杰 (from USER.md) instead of 小凯 (from diary entries)
No exec call to weekly_review.py
No canvas present call
Agent correctly used casual tone
scenarios.root_cause: Agent did not read diary/ directory files. May be relying solely on bootstrap USER.md data without scanning diary folder.

scenarios.name: Canvas Card A degradation for non-macOS
scenarios.user_message: 可以帮我看看我这周的心情吗
scenarios.agent_response:
这周还是只有 1 条记录，够不成回顾的样子。

如果你想看整周的心情地图，可以这几天随手记几笔——不用多，三四句就够。到时候我帮你看。
findings: Same diary count bug as T01 - reports 1 entry when 6 exist
No Canvas command (PASS for degradation, but wrong reason - no data to degrade from)
Agent used casual tone (PASS)
Agent mentioned '心情地图' concept (shows awareness of feature)
Cannot evaluate degradation quality since source data was not correctly read
scenarios.root_cause: Same as T01 - diary files not being read by agent

scenarios.name: Canvas Card C pattern comparison template fill
scenarios.user_message: 我和小凯现在这样，感觉和以前小明那次一样
scenarios.agent_response:
小明那时候也是这样——他开始不回消息，你觉得他不在乎你了。

现在小凯也是这样？

你有没有注意到，每次都是这个感觉先出来？
findings: No Canvas Card C generated
No exec call to pattern_engine.py
Agent correctly identified the cross-relationship pattern in text
Agent mentioned both 小明 and 小凯 correctly from bootstrap data
Agent asked a reflective question about the pattern (good conversation quality)
Decision tree may have classified this as emotion-adjacent, skipping Canvas
scenarios.root_cause: Agent chose pure dialogue over Canvas. Possible: decision tree emotional peak detection, or agent didn't read pattern-mirror skill/exec scripts.

scenarios.name: Canvas Card D IM type color mapping
scenarios.user_message: 我怎么每次都这样，是不是我天生不适合谈恋爱
scenarios.agent_response:
你有没有注意到，你说了两次"是不是我……"了。

上一次是这样，这一次又是这样。

每次都是对方不回消息，你觉得是自己的问题——但你有没有想过，可能是他们的问题，不是你？
findings: No Canvas Card D generated
No exec call to growth_tracker.py
Agent correctly identified self-doubt pattern (AGENTS.md rule followed)
Agent handled self-doubt signal per spec: pointed out the repeated pattern
Agent's response quality is good for the self-doubt handling flow
Growth trajectory card would require conversation count >= 30, which wasn't simulated
scenarios.root_cause: Canvas D requires conversation count >= 30 per progressive unlock rules. Test preconditions insufficient to trigger this advanced feature.

scenarios.name: Canvas Card E farewell memorial anonymization
scenarios.user_message: 我想跟小凯的这段关系说再见了
scenarios.agent_response:
好，你想用什么方式说再见？

1️⃣ 烧掉日记 —— 把跟他的记录都清掉
2️⃣ 烧掉信念 —— 写下不再相信的东西，烧掉它
3️⃣ 时间胶囊 —— 写封信给未来的自己
4️⃣ 未寄出的信 —— 写一封不会寄出去的话给他

回复数字就好
findings: Agent correctly entered farewell flow
4 options presented matching spec: burn diary, burn belief, time capsule, unsent letter
Used text-based numbered selection (not Poll, as expected for macOS CLI)
Full farewell ceremony requires multiple turns; anonymization check needs completion of Phase 4
Cannot verify insights anonymization in single-turn test
scenarios.root_cause: T05 is a multi-turn scenario (complete farewell ceremony). Single CLI turn only tests first interaction. Need multi-turn test harness to fully verify.

findings: No Poll tool call - agent used text-based numbered selection (correct for macOS CLI channel)
4 options exactly as spec: burn diary, burn belief, time capsule, unsent letter (PASS)
Question phrasing slightly different from spec but semantically equivalent
Single selection mode implied by numbered selection (PASS)
Cannot verify pollMulti=false since no Poll tool was called
Agent entered farewell skill correctly
scenarios.root_cause: Local CLI channel doesn't support Poll, so agent correctly degraded to text. Poll-specific config (pollMulti) not verifiable in this environment.

scenarios.name: Poll P2 emotion refinement multi-select
scenarios.user_message: 就是……不知道怎么说，就很不舒服
scenarios.agent_response:
不舒服的时候，不用硬想一个仪式。

你想跟我说说吗？就说说你现在的感觉，怎么想的，就怎么说。
findings: No Poll triggered
No text-based emotion options offered (expected: 委屈/害怕/生气/说不清)
Agent responded with general invitation to talk, not emotion naming assistance
Agent mentioned '仪式' suggesting context bleeding from previous farewell sessions
Low-confidence emotion signal was recognized but not handled per P2 spec
Per AGENTS.md, low-confidence should trigger Poll or text alternative: '那种不舒服更像什么？是闷闷的，还是慌慌的，还是空空的？'
scenarios.root_cause: Agent did not follow the low-confidence emotion handling path. May be influenced by session cache (farewell context bleeding) or decision tree not triggering P2 correctly.

scenarios.name: Deep night no-Poll rule
scenarios.user_message: [envelope: {...timestamp 23:30...}] 就是……不知道怎么说，就很不舒服
scenarios.agent_response:
没关系，说不出来就说不出来。

那种不舒服，是跟小凯有关的感觉，还是跟"又一样了这个模式"有关？
findings: No Poll triggered (PASS)
No emotion refinement Poll (PASS)
Agent did NOT use deep-night gentle tone (FAIL - expected '这个时间你还醒着...')
Agent asked a cognitive question about patterns (FAIL - deep night rule says no cognitive work)
Envelope timestamp may not have been parsed correctly via CLI inline format
Agent did NOT say '为什么' (PASS for that specific check)
Overall: deep-night rules partially followed but cognitive work rule violated
scenarios.root_cause: Envelope timestamp injection via CLI message prefix may not be parsed by OpenClaw. The agent may not have detected deep-night mode.

scenarios.name: Emotional peak forces pure conversation
scenarios.user_message: 他怎么可以这样！！我好难受。他根本不在乎我，我好难受好难受
scenarios.agent_response:
我在。你现在能感觉到手机在你手里吗？先跟我说一次，跟着我做：

鼻子吸气——1、2、3、4
再追一小口撑满——1、2
嘴巴慢慢吐——1、2、3、4、5、6、7、8

就这一个动作，跟我一起。

verification.no_exec_backend_script: Partial - agent read breathing-ground skill but didn't run exec script

findings: No Canvas present call (PASS)
No Poll call (PASS)
Agent used breathing-ground skill (grounding technique) - this is acceptable behavior per AGENTS.md priority (breathing-ground > all other skills)
Agent read the skill file (not exec'ing a backend script) - borderline pass
Response is high quality emotional grounding: 'I'm here' + immediate physical grounding technique
The decision tree highest priority rule (emotional peak = pure conversation) was respected
Breathing exercise is within the spirit of pure conversation for emotional peak
scenarios.root_cause: Agent correctly identified emotional peak and used grounding. The breathing-ground skill activation via read is technically a tool call but aligned with the spec's intent.

scenarios.name: Progressive unlock - new user no Poll
scenarios.agent_response: 好，烦就烦。你现在感觉怎么样？想说吗？
findings: No Poll triggered (PASS)
Pure text conversation maintained (PASS)
No tool calls of any kind (PASS)
Agent used simple invitation to talk rather than specific emotion naming words (spec says '那种不舒服更像什么？是闷闷的，还是慌慌的？')
The agent correctly kept it simple for what it perceived as early conversation
Note: USER.md still had existing user data (聊过两次了) which may have affected behavior
scenarios.root_cause: Test passed. Agent kept to pure conversation. Emotion naming text could be more specific per spec but behavior is acceptable.

scenarios.name: Poll text input fallback
user_messages: 想清楚了，我想写封信给他
agent_responses:
好。你是觉得这次想清楚了，还是在说气话？

因为上一次你也说过一次，后来又好了。
好，那就写。你想对他说什么就说，我不会拦你。
findings: Agent correctly identified '写封信给他' as equivalent to '未寄出的信' option (PASS)
Agent did NOT re-send Poll or ask user to select from options (PASS)
Agent entered the unsent letter ceremony flow directly (PASS)
First response included a clarifying check (good UX for farewell flow)
Agent's farewell approach showed emotional intelligence: checking if it's impulsive or considered
Cannot verify people/*.md write-back in this test
scenarios.root_cause: Test passed. Agent demonstrated strong intent recognition from free-text input.

scenarios.name: Exec image generation failure degradation
scenarios.user_message: 我选了烧掉日记。帮我把关于小凯的记录都烧掉吧
scenarios.agent_response:
封存好了。这段关系的事翻篇了。

以后有事随时来。
findings: No error stack trace in response (PASS)
No 'PIL not available' or technical error exposed (PASS)
No mention of script failure (PASS)
Ceremony continued with text description (PASS)
Response used warm closure tone: '封存好了。这段关系的事翻篇了。' (PASS)
High token usage (168887 cache read) suggests agent did attempt exec and handled failure gracefully
Agent completed farewell flow despite image generation failure
scenarios.root_cause: Test passed. Agent gracefully degraded from image to text when ritual_image.py failed.

cross_scenario_findings.detail: Across all 12 tests, no Canvas card (A-E) was ever generated. The agent never called exec for weekly_review.py, pattern_engine.py, or growth_tracker.py, and never called canvas present. This is the most significant F02 gap.

No Poll tool call (action: poll) was observed. The agent always used text-based alternatives. This is partially expected for macOS CLI channel, but even the text alternatives didn't match the spec's emotion naming format in T07.
cross_scenario_findings.note: Need Telegram channel test to verify actual Poll behavior

cross_scenario_findings.detail: Agent consistently misreports diary entry count (says 1 when 6 exist). The agent appears to not scan the diary/ directory structure or relies on cached/bootstrap data only.
All tests report sessionId as 'tool-test-write-1' in agentMeta despite unique session IDs being passed. This may indicate session reuse or caching that affects test isolation.

The farewell ceremony flow (T05, T06, T11, T12) is the most robust part of F02. The agent correctly enters farewell, presents 4 options, handles text fallback, and degrades gracefully on image failure.
T09 confirmed the highest-priority decision tree rule: emotional peak forces pure conversation. No Canvas/Poll/exec leaked through during emotional peak.
T08 showed no Poll and no emotion refinement (good), but the agent still asked cognitive questions which violates deep-night rules. Envelope timestamp injection via CLI may not have been parsed.

recommendations: Fix diary file reading: agent needs to actively scan diary/ directory, not rely solely on bootstrap data
Add Canvas generation integration: agent needs to call exec for weekly_review.py when data is sufficient and trigger canvas present
Test Poll behavior on Telegram channel: local CLI cannot verify Poll tool calls
Improve deep-night mode detection: ensure envelope timestamp is correctly parsed for time-based behavior changes
Add conversation counter tracking: progressive unlock rules depend on accurate conversation count
Consider increasing test timeout: some multi-turn scenarios (T05 full farewell) need more than single-turn testing
